observation.dom_tree:
<div class="app">
  <h1>
    Todos
  <form id="todo-form" data-testid="todo-form">
    <input type="text" id="todo-input" data-testid="todo-input" placeholder="What needs to be done?">
      <button type="submit" data-testid="add-button">
        Add
    <ul id="todo-list" data-testid="todo-list">
    <div id="stats" data-testid="stats">
observation.task_description:
You are interacting with a todo application in a web browser.
Your task is to add three new todos:
1. "Review PR #42"
2. "Deploy to staging"
3. "Write unit tests"
Use the input field and add button to create each todo.
